title: Tools n'stuff
description: The 3D simple resource pack with renaming.
body:
### All of the main info:

I will be making more updates soon too!

All of the new renamings will be shown in the change logs.

**[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) is REQUIRED TO MAKE RESOURCE PACK WORK ON FABRIC!!!**
**AND OPTIFINE ON FORGE!!!**

This resource pack adds item's 3D textures that you can make shown by renaming special items!
For example: if you rename you iron sword with "katana" on the anvil you will have a model of katana instead of your common sword texture.

You also can optionaly install [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) to see the renamings on the anvil.

 



<details>
<summary>Don't open me!</summary>

I hope you like my rp. More updates soon :)

</details>

![Tools n'stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58e34327e9c9377af252a97b4bf6182e0b70bae9.png)
